summary: Live preflight shows the original representative #57184 and candidate #59577 are already closed, so no close/comment/label mutation is valid for them. The session-start full-reindex bug family is already closed as implemented on main, while the distinct incremental session-sync performance work remains open on #40919 with replacement PR #75179. #75179 is related but not merge-ready or closeout-ready because ClawSweeper found unresolved broad/data-model review issues and a current proof check is failing; this job does not allow fix PRs or merge repair.
